channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excessive rubbish 4 days, 5th May
item.description:
Excessive rubbish on Aden lodge for 4 days despite being reported 4 days ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th May
item.description:
Getting worse over multiple days - see timestamps in photos

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish in the road, 5th May
item.description:
Unhygienic and unsightly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hardy Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins….again., 5th May
item.description:
2-4 overflowing bins with literal dog poo. Next to a school. This is so so grim. And dangerous as they’re all next to a school. Please think about a dog waste bin somewhere?!?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in parking bay, 5th May
item.description:
Fridge, possibly a gas canister and some other rubbish has been left in a parking bay. Noticed this on Monday 4th May, very recent.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson Road and Brondesbury villas, 5th May
item.description:
One bag left as fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mess around bin, 5th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Big fly tip and overflowing bins in Barbrook house, 5th May
item.description:
There is a big fly tip in this area. Underneath all the cardboard, wood panels, chairs and random rubbish there are also two big sofas. Last time this was reported the case was closed but not all the rubbish had been cleared. Please don’t do that.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement breaking up, 5th May
item.description:
The pavement is in very poor repair and it’s breaking up - it creating a trip hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Oak Drive, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chute On Tower Block 1-66 Blocked, 5th May
item.description:
All Bank Hoilday Weekend The Chute Has Been Blocked Again, Can't Understand Why This Isn't Classed As A Emergency For Some Reason What Jokes Again Wondering How Long B4 Sorted Again.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
